publishedAbstract: - Service `rook-ceph-rgw-ocs-storagecluster-cephobjectstore` in openshift-storage namespace is firing warning event: `Insufficient Node information: allocatable CPU or zone not specified on one or more nodes, addressType: IPv4`
publishedTitle: Service rook-ceph-rgw-ocs-storagecluster-cephobjectstore firing warning event: "Insufficient Node information"
